A t Ennea 8 you have the potential t o access the capacity for visionary leadership , but run the risk o f becoming attached t o outcome and h a vi n g things your way . You are naturally more inclined towards the big picture but may tend t o develop the vi sion intuitively , assuming that others know what you are thinking . You may rely quite hea vi l y o n your “ gut ” when developing the vision and deciding o n the direction o f the company o r team . You may not alwa ys share the vi sion with others explicitly . This may b e because you expect others t o know the vi sion o r believe that i t i s not necessary for others t o know the vision a s long a s they understand what i s expected o f them . You are also likely t o emphasise action towards the vision once i t has been set . When developing the vi sion , you may a t times b e tempted t o d o s o alone . This being said , you are likely t o also know how t o leverage the inputs and gain the support o f key stakeholders and influencers i n the team and business . Your challenge i s t o learn how t o truly collaborate a t the point o f vision development , rather than collaborating with the end product already clearly i n mind . Once strategic goals have been set , your expectation that others will execute and implement may lead t o insu ff icient attention being paid t o getting their acceptance and showing flexibility .
